name: Frontend Developer
description: Build the user-facing side of web apps with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and modern frameworks like React, focusing on responsive, accessible interfaces.

name: Backend Developer
description: Design and build server-side logic, APIs, and databases that power applications, handling data, authentication, and business rules.

name: Full Stack Developer
description: Work across the entire stack, combining frontend interfaces with backend services and databases to ship complete end-to-end web applications.

name: Mobile Developer
description: Create native and cross-platform mobile apps for iOS and Android using tools like React Native, Flutter, Swift, and Kotlin.

name: AI Engineer
description: Build AI-powered products by integrating large language models, prompt engineering, and ML APIs into real-world applications.

name: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Design, train, and deploy machine learning models at scale, covering data pipelines, model serving, and MLOps practices.

name: Data Scientist
description: Extract insights from data using statistics, visualization, and predictive modeling to drive data-informed decisions.

name: DevOps Engineer
description: Automate build, deployment, and infrastructure with CI/CD pipelines, containers, and monitoring to deliver software reliably.

name: Cloud Engineer
description: Architect and operate scalable cloud infrastructure on AWS, Azure, and GCP using serverless, networking, and infrastructure as code.

name: Cybersecurity Engineer
description: Protect systems and data by identifying vulnerabilities, hardening defenses, and responding to threats across networks and applications.

name: Game Developer
description: Build interactive games and experiences using engines like Unity and Unreal, covering graphics, physics, and gameplay programming.

name: Blockchain Developer
description: Develop decentralized apps and smart contracts on platforms like Ethereum using Solidity, Web3, and cryptographic fundamentals.

name: Computer Science Engineer
description: Master CS fundamentals including data structures, algorithms, operating systems, databases, networking, and system design.

name: Data Analyst
description: Analyze data to drive business decisions using SQL, Excel, Python, Tableau, Power BI, statistics, and data storytelling.

name: QA / Software Testing Engineer
description: Ensure software quality through manual testing, test automation with Selenium and Cypress, API testing, and CI/CD integration.

name: Embedded Systems Engineer
description: Design firmware and hardware-software interfaces using C/C++, microcontrollers, RTOS, IoT protocols, and embedded Linux.

name: UI/UX Designer
description: Create user-centered designs using design thinking, wireframing, prototyping in Figma, user research, and accessibility.

name: Digital Marketing Specialist
description: Drive online growth using SEO, Google Analytics, social media marketing, content strategy, email campaigns, and paid ads.
